refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital cage with a blanket on its back. The cage appears to be in a hospital setting.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in a cage in the hospital, it was even wearing a blanket. This is completely unacceptable and raises serious concerns about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital. I hope the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in a cage in the hospital, it's even got a blanket on it. This is disgusting and something needs to be done about it.
